title: Warm Sweet Malaysian Potatoes Casserole
description: A nostalgic, gooey casserole of jersey royal potatoes infused with coconut milk, ginger, and a hint of lime, slow‑cooked to perfection in a Dutch oven.
instructions: Preheat the Dutch oven over medium heat and lightly oil the bottom.
Peel and cube the jersey royal potatoes into uniform 1‑inch pieces.
Sauté the garlic and ginger in the pot for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the coriander, turmeric, and cayenne pepper and cook for another 30 seconds.
Stir in the palm sugar and erythritol until they dissolve.
Pour in the light coconut milk, add the potato cubes, lime juice, salt, and pepper, and mix well.
Cover the pot, reduce heat to low, and simmer for 30 minutes until the potatoes are tender.
Stir once, then continue cooking for another 10 minutes to thicken the sauce.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed, then remove from heat.
Serve the casserole hot, garnished with a sprinkle of fresh lime zest if desired.
